message:
fix(fortify): disable fread_unlocked buffer check to avoid libsystemd false positives

Skip the fortify size check in __fread_unlocked_chk entirely — fread
returns at most nmemb items so buffer overflow is impossible at the
library level, and the check was producing false positives with
libsystemd's internal buffer management where buflen didn't match
the runtime buffer size. The _buflen parameter is now unused.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
